entity.label: Tabbath
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Famous, a town in the tribe of Ephraim (Judg. 7:22), to the south of Bethshean, near the Jordan.

nodes.label: Tabbath
nodes.description: Famous, a town in the tribe of Ephraim (Judg. 7:22), to the south of Bethshean, near the Jordan.

verses.text: And the three hundred blew the trumpets, and the LORD set every man’s sword against his fellow, even throughout all the host: and the host fled to Bethshittah in Zererath, and to the border of Abelmeholah, unto Tabbath.
